title: PurchaseContractResponse
description: Implementation of the 'PurchaseContractResponse' model. Response model for POST PurchaseContract endpoint

ClientId.description: The ID of the client who is purchasing the contract.

UniqueClientId.description: The Unique ID of the client who is purchasing the contract.

LocationId.description: The ID of the location where the contract is being purchased.

ContractId.description: The ID of the general contract being purchased.

ClientContractId.description: The ID of the specific contract being purchased by this specific client, not to be confused with the `ContractId`, which refers to a general contract that the business offers.

PaymentProcessingFailures.description: Contains information only if SCA challenge is indicated.
